title: zuum
description: A very basic zoom mod designed for fabric and quilt
body:
**REQUIRES: [Fabric Api](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api), [YACL](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)**

# Zuum

Zuum is a basic zooming mod made for fabric, controlled using a keybind (defaults to alt).

# Features

- Zoom in and out using the scroll wheel
- View bobbing and mouse sensitivity can be reduced while zooming
- Hud can be hidden when zooming
- Modifiable step size
- The zoom amount can be shown in the actionbar
- Different transitions and durations depending on the scroll direction
- Keybind can be set to hold / toggle mode

# Transitions

Currently there are 14 supported transitions that come preinstalled with zuum

- Instant
- Linear
- Ease in sine
- Ease out sine
- Ease in out sine
- Ease in quadratic
- Ease out quadratic
- Ease in out quadratic
- Ease in cubic
- Ease out cubic
- Ease in out cubic
- Ease in exponential
- Ease out exponential
- Ease in out exponential
